w-full mt-4 flex flex-col items-center
bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 p-4 w-full rounded-sm text-left mb-4
flex justify-between items-center border-b border-gray-200 pb-1 mb-2

h3.class: font-bold text-gray-700 text-[11px] flex items-center gap-1

p.class: text-[10px] text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wide font-semibold mb-1
text-[11px] text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wide font-semibold mb-1

flex justify-between items-center border-b border-orange-200 pb-1 mb-2

button.class: w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 py-2.5 rounded-sm font-bold text-sm hover:bg-gray-100 transition

hidden space-y-4
flex gap-3 mt-1
